Name: SOUND_RESIDENT_PARAM
Description: Defines resident sound configuration data linked to equipment loadouts, used to determine audio behavior based on equipped sets.

Fields.Name: Equipment Set ID 1
Fields.Description: ID of the first equipment set used for sound configuration mapping.

Fields.Name: Equipment Set ID 2
Fields.Description: ID of the second equipment set used for sound configuration mapping.

Fields.Name: Equipment Set ID 3
Fields.Description: ID of the third equipment set used for sound configuration mapping.

Fields.Name: Equipment Set ID 4
Fields.Description: ID of the fourth equipment set used for sound configuration mapping.
